rationale: The cited paper focuses on excessive-use management in online gaming via a continuous-time structural demand model (rewards, notifications, time limits), while the citing paper models retail purchase limits during exogenous shortages with a two-period game-theoretic framework. Given only a bare DOI match and no in-text citation snippet/reference text, the current evidence is too sparse to tell whether this is substantive reuse of a limit-management idea or a peripheral mention.
